atomicity.message: The staged diff is exactly the land-08 formatter-safe JSON and stale-attestation guard slice: docs/attestation-schema.md formatter-safety docs, internal/backpressure/artifacts.go stale guard plus stagedAttestationPaths helper, and internal/backpressure/artifacts_test.go formatter/stale tests. No result-contract, bead metadata, verifier-policy, lint-enforcement, or other later-unit files are staged.

conditions.message: The staged Go and docs slice is formatter-clean and passes the relevant focused and full regression tests.
evidence: ScarletMarsh verified git diff --cached --name-status showed exactly docs/attestation-schema.md, internal/backpressure/artifacts.go, and internal/backpressure/artifacts_test.go staged.
git diff --cached --check produced no whitespace errors.
Staged Go blobs for internal/backpressure/artifacts.go and internal/backpressure/artifacts_test.go matched gofmt output.
go test ./internal/backpressure -run 'Artifact|Attestation|Marshal|Stale|Format' passed.
go test ./cmd/burpvalve -run 'Attestation|Stale|Commit' passed.
go test ./... passed.

conditions.message: The staged implementation keeps formatter-safe artifact output and stale-attestation detection localized, using one helper for staged attestation path detection and existing writeArtifact formatting.
evidence: BrightOwl verified exactly the three packet paths are staged, stat is 75 insertions and 4 deletions, and git diff --cached --check produced no diagnostics.
writeArtifact uses json.MarshalIndent plus one trailing newline, and stagedAttestationPaths centralizes excluded staged attestation path selection.
The staged diff contains the stale-guard branch, one stagedAttestationPaths helper, formatter-safe assertions, stale/malformed attestation test update, and formatter docs only.
Focused tests and go test ./... passed.

conditions.message: The staged guard blocks stale or invalid staged attestation reuse instead of letting a generated artifact create a superficial pass after payload drift.
evidence: BrightOwl verified RunPreCommit accepts a staged valid artifact only after artifact.ValidatePassing(ExpectedBinding(plan)).
When no explicit responses or prompt exist, stagedAttestationPaths causes stale or invalid staged attestations to write a blocked report with stale-or-invalid messaging.
TestRunPreCommitDoesNotAcceptStaleOrMalformedStagedAttestations runs without prompt fallback and asserts stale/malformed staged attestations fail, do not pass, and write a blocked report.
The missing-responses test uses fixturePayloadOnlyStaged so stale generated evidence cannot mask missing response behavior.
ScarletMarsh independently returned pass for anti-reward-hacking with matching stale-evidence rejection evidence.
Focused tests and go test ./... passed.

conditions.message: The governed formatter and stale-attestation behaviors have direct test coverage in the staged test hunks.
evidence: Passing artifact test calls assertFormatterSafeArtifactJSON.
Missing-response blocked-report test reads the blocked report and asserts the same formatter-safe JSON helper.
The helper checks exactly one trailing newline, two-space indentation, and valid JSON.
Stale/malformed staged attestation test asserts non-pass, stale/invalid error text, and blocked report path/message.
fixturePayloadOnlyStaged isolates the missing-response test from excluded staged attestation fixtures.
Focused tests passed.

conditions.message: The staged land-08 payload satisfies its done surface: stale attestation paths are detected, generated JSON formatting is documented and tested, and all requested tests passed.
evidence: BrightOwl checked the land-08 bead acceptance criteria: indented/newline-terminated attestation JSON, stable formatter-safe output, staged attestation stale surfacing, and formatter-safety documentation.
stagedAttestationPaths and the stale guard produce a blocked report before response prompting in noninteractive no-responses mode.
Generated artifacts are written with json.MarshalIndent and a trailing newline; this implementation already existed in HEAD and is now covered by tests/docs.

docs/attestation-schema.md explains generated evidence is stable, indented JSON with trailing newline and advises excluding generated evidence from incompatible broad formatters rather than editing evidence by hand.
git diff --cached --check, focused tests, and go test ./... passed.

conditions.message: The payload directly governs evidence handling and improves it: generated artifacts are asserted to be stable JSON and stale or malformed staged attestations are rejected before prompt handling.
evidence: artifacts.go adds a stale staged-attestation check when no responses file and no prompt are provided, writing a blocked report and returning a stale-or-invalid error.
artifacts_test.go adds assertFormatterSafeArtifactJSON checks for passing artifacts and blocked reports.
artifacts_test.go updates the stale/malformed attestation test to require a stale-or-invalid error and blocked report instead of falling into prompt handling.
docs/attestation-schema.md documents stable, indented JSON with a trailing newline for generated evidence files.
Focused backpressure artifact tests and go test ./... passed.

conditions.message: The staged payload does not contain a destructive-operation surface: no deletes, resets, force pushes, deploys, migrations, external sends, or production mutations are added or changed.

Diff inspection found only docs, tests, and in-process stale-attestation rejection logic.

conditions.message: The staged data-integrity surface was inspected: generated evidence remains valid stable JSON, and stale or invalid staged attestation evidence is blocked rather than accepted as current proof.
evidence: writeArtifact produces JSON via json.MarshalIndent and appends exactly one newline before writing.
assertFormatterSafeArtifactJSON requires a trailing newline, rejects more than one trailing newline, requires two-space pretty printing, and unmarshals JSON successfully.
Staged artifact reuse is accepted only after ValidatePassing(ExpectedBinding(plan)); otherwise stale excluded attestations block before prompt fallback in no-responses mode.
stagedAttestationPaths checks ExcludedStagedPaths for the expected current attestation or any backpressure/attestations/*.json file.
Focused tests and go test ./... passed.

conditions.message: Under A14b this cell is governed because the stale guard changes evidence acceptance. The staged code narrows acceptance of staged attestation evidence and does not add credential, permission, auth, execution-boundary, or secret-handling changes.
evidence: The staged payload changes evidence acceptance by rejecting stale/invalid staged attestations in noninteractive no-responses mode.
Stale/malformed staged attestations are asserted to fail with stale-or-invalid messaging and write a blocked report, rather than silently proceeding to acceptance or prompt behavior.
Security scans found no credential, auth, permission, execution, or new file-mutation surfaces introduced in the staged diff.

docs/attestation-schema.md advises excluding generated evidence from incompatible formatters rather than editing evidence by hand, supporting evidence integrity without introducing secret/config handling.
ScarletMarsh independently returned pass for security-boundaries with matching evidence-acceptance and no-secret-surface evidence.
